explicit_text: Mexico is where my family originally lived before immigrating to the United States. My mom first moved there, and after some years, my brothers and I joined her. I have deep ties to Mexico through my culture, especially through folkloric dance, which I started practicing since I was twelve. My dad introduced me to Mexican folklore, and I cherish the traditions and celebrations we had there.

explicit_text: Minnesota became my family's new home after they immigrated from Mexico. My mom and brothers moved there first, and I joined them five years later. entity: Palace of Fine Arts, Mexico City
explicit_text: The Palace of Fine Arts in Mexico City holds a special place in my heart because my dad took me there for my eleventh birthday to see the Ballet Folklórico de México. That visit sparked my love for Mexican folkloric dance, which has been a big part of my life since then. It was an unforgettable experience that deepened my connection to my culture.
